title: 65. Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)

examples.explanation: After inserting 'apple', searching 'apple' returns true, searching 'app' returns false, startsWith('app') returns true. After inserting 'app', searching 'app' returns true.
After inserting 'hello', both search('hello') and startsWith('hell') return true.

hints: A Trie (prefix tree) is a tree data structure used for efficient retrieval of keys in a dataset of strings.
Each node contains an array of child pointers (one for each character) and a boolean flag indicating whether the node marks the end of a word.
For insert: traverse character by character, creating nodes as needed, and mark the final node as end of word.
For search: traverse character by character; if a character is missing, return false; check the end-of-word flag at the final node.
For startsWith: same as search but return true if the path exists, regardless of the end-of-word flag.
